DESIGN_NOTE: NEW_GEO_RE step01: ADR v4c geometry retained, but all axial aperture/window clear radii are matched to the Be cryostat-window radius; A4K is omitted, the Nb can window is retained, and the vacuum-jacket aperture is closed only by the Be window.

COLD_PLATES.name: ColdPlate_50mK
COLD_PLATES.basis: Model 103 supports 1 K and 50 mK stages; 45 mm plate radius gives margin for the 34 mm-ID sample box and mounting screws.

COLD_PLATES.name: ColdPlate_1K
COLD_PLATES.basis: 1 K intercept stage, separated from 50 mK plate to leave room for heat-switch/strap envelope.

COLD_PLATES.name: ColdPlate_4K
COLD_PLATES.basis: 4 K / 2.7 K pulse-tube stage analog; radius leaves routing margin.

COLD_PLATES.name: ColdPlate_50K
COLD_PLATES.basis: 50 K interface plate aligned with commercial 50 K radiation-shield stage.

SAMPLE_BOX.name: TES_SampleBox_Cu
SAMPLE_BOX.basis: Engineering sample box: 3 mm Cu open/apertured cylinder; bottom disk contacts 50 mK plate; surrounds TES stack and Si substrates; top has Al window/foil placeholder.

window.name: SampleBox_Al_Window
window.basis: Thin Al sample-box window/foil placeholder; radius matched to the Be cryostat-window clear radius.

OPEN_BOTTOM_CANS.name: Nb_SC_Detector_Can
OPEN_BOTTOM_CANS.basis: Thin removable superconducting detector can indexed to the 50 mK cold-plate flange. Inner radius is just outside the plate edge, and the lower lip starts at the plate bottom surface for light-tight seating without overlap.

CRYOSTAT_SHELLS.name: Thermal_4K_Al_Shield
CRYOSTAT_SHELLS.basis: Commercial ADRs use nickel-plated aluminum radiation shields at 50 K and 4 K; 0.8 mm is mass-model baseline.

CRYOSTAT_SHELLS.name: Thermal_50K_Al_Shield
CRYOSTAT_SHELLS.basis: 50 K aluminum radiation shield enclosing colder stages.

CRYOSTAT_SHELLS.name: Vacuum_Jacket_Al
CRYOSTAT_SHELLS.basis: Al cryostat vacuum jacket mass model; the aperture is closed only by the Be cryostat window. 2.5 mm is not pressure-vessel certification.

ACTIVE_SHIELD.name: CeBr3_Active_Shield
ACTIVE_SHIELD.basis: Active scintillator outside cryostat. CeBr3 is default no-O candidate; BGO control keeps CAM511-like dimensions.

OUTER_MECHANICAL_SHELL.name: Outer_Al_Mech_Shell
OUTER_MECHANICAL_SHELL.basis: Outer cover outside scintillator, not the vacuum boundary; structural mass placeholder.

WINDOWS.name: SampleBox_Al_Window
WINDOWS.basis: Thin Al sample-box window/foil placeholder; radius matched to the Be cryostat-window clear radius.

WINDOWS.name: Win_Nb_SC_Detector_Can
WINDOWS.basis: NEW_GEO_RE step01 update: thin Nb window/foil placeholder across the Nb superconducting detector-can aperture; radius matched to Be window.

WINDOWS.name: Win_4K_Al_Shield
WINDOWS.basis: NEW_GEO_RE step01: added missing thin Al window across the 4 K thermal-shield aperture; radius matched to Be window.

WINDOWS.name: Win_50K_Al_Shield
WINDOWS.basis: NEW_GEO_RE step01: added missing thin Al window across the 50 K thermal-shield aperture; radius matched to Be window.

WINDOWS.name: Win_Be_Cryostat
WINDOWS.basis: Matched to fix/code/geometry Win_Be: radius 1.898 cm and thickness 0.015 cm after cm scaling; radius is the NEW_GEO_RE aperture reference.

COLLIMATOR.basis: Project W grid retained as first collimator baseline; compare with CAM511 W aperture/passive shield.

META.can_inner_radius_basis: 50mK plate outer radius + small non-overlap clearance
